headline: Liberty Energy (LBRT) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Ron Gusek: Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining us to discuss our full year and fourth quarter 2024 operational and financial results.  Full year return of capital employed was 17% and our 2024 cash return on capital invested of 21% exceeded the 13-year S&P average.

headline: New Hungary govt should open door to EU funding but fiscal pressures to persist - S&P Global
summary: Fiscal pressures in Hungary are likely to persist despite the likelihood that Peter Magyar's ousting of Viktor Orban in the country's election at the weekend should begin to unlock EU funding again,...

headline: CARFAX: Used Car Prices Spike after Hitting 12-Month Low
summary: Ahead of Tax Day, new CARFAX data shows used car prices are climbing sharply after hitting their lowest point in the past year. The average price of a used vehicle is now about $25,500 — up roughly $1,500 in just one month.

raw.headline: CARFAX: Used Car Prices Spike after Hitting 12-Month Low
raw.summary: Ahead of Tax Day, new CARFAX data shows used car prices are climbing sharply after hitting their lowest point in the past year. The average price of a used vehicle is now about $25,500 — up roughly $1,500 in just one month.

headline: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From S&P Global’s Report
